source: Insta360 Go 3S head-mounted camera, Tallmilan 2026 stage start
description: Audio from 'Are you ready' through start beep and a few shots into the stage.
beep_time_method: leading edge of the 3047.5 Hz timer tone, defined as the first sample at which the bandpass-filtered envelope exceeds 5x the pre-beep p95 noise floor. STFT energy in [2.5,3.5] kHz first crosses 5x noise at this timestamp.
